title: Opening for Software Engineer at Nature's Basket Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Nature's Basket Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Nature's Basket Holdings Services. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Dhanbad-based team.

About Nature's Basket Holdings Services:
Nature's Basket Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nature's Basket Holdings Services!
